calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary & Gregory Dalzell, plaintiffs/respondents appear.
Defendant/Appellant, Oak MG LLS is not present.
Parties present are sworn.

The Court outilnes the following:
-Parties, including Matthew Waller via Zoom, stipulated on October 24, 2022 to a Judge Pro Tem.
-Judge Pro Tem William Lynn entered judgment in favor of plaintiffs in the amount of $9245.68 with interest in the amount of $225, totaling $2470.68 on October 24, 2022.
-Defendant filed the appeal on November 28, 2022.
-Per CCP appeals must be filed within 30 days of the Judgment.
-The Court renders the appeal as untimely.

The Court issues the following ruling:

The Court affirms the judgment entered on October 24, 2022 by Judge Pro Tem William Lynn as the appeal filed was untimely and as the moving party, defendant/appellant, Oak MF LLc is not present.

Matter adjourned.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo, Clerk: K. Septien, Not Reported, (306).
